text:
Thanks BonoMedica's team!
Professional, attentive, quick help!

translations.sr:
Hvala timu BonoMedica!
Profesionalna, pažljiva, brza pomoć!
translations.sr_cyrl:
Хвала тиму BonoMedica!
Професионална, пажљива, брза помоћ!
translations.en:
Thanks BonoMedica's team!
Professional, attentive, quick help!
translations.ru:
Спасибо команде BonoMedica!
Профессиональная, внимательная, быстрая помощь!
translations.de:
Danke an das Team von BonoMedica!
Professionelle, aufmerksame, schnelle Hilfe!
translations.tr:
BonoMedica ekibine teşekkürler!
Profesyonel, dikkatli, hızlı yardım!
